titleEn: Cencosud announced acquisition of 100% of Makro in Colombia
contentHtml: US: Court rejects Albertsons bid for Kroger legal documentsSupermarket News reported: "A court in Delaware has rejected Albertsons' effort to force Kroger to produce certain documents related to the planning of the two companies' failed merger".Source: supermarketnews.com US: MOM's Organic Market to…
